_meta.description: Official childcare resource registry for enrichment adapters. status=verified means the user explicitly confirmed the source. status=not_verified means the entry may contain a lead or fallback URL but is not yet user-confirmed.

AL.name: Alabama
AL.query_notes: Google query for 'child care search Alabama' surfaced Alabama Child Care Search via the childcare.gov state resources page.
AL.notes: No direct Alabama state search endpoint confirmed yet.

AK.name: Alaska
AK.query_notes: Use official Alaska child care family/provider search resources rather than assuming open-data endpoint.
AK.notes: Official state childcare source verified as portal/family resource, not a confirmed open-data dataset.

AZ.name: Arizona
AZ.query_notes: Use Arizona child care search with provider name and city filters.
AZ.notes: Direct Arizona provider search URL provided by user and activated for staging.

AR.name: Arkansas
AR.query_notes: Use Arkansas provider search portal directly for child care provider lookups.
AR.notes: Direct Arkansas provider search URL provided by user.

CA.name: California
CA.query_notes: Query datastore_search_sql against resource 5bac6551-4d6c-45d6-93b8-e6ded428d98e selecting facility_name, facility_address, facility_city, facility_state, facility_zip, facility_capacity, facility_telephone_number filtered by facility_name and facility_city.
CA.notes: Official California CKAN dataset endpoint provided and wired into scraper adapter.

CO.name: Colorado
CO.query_notes: Use Colorado SODA API selecting provider_name, street_address, city, state, zip, total_licensed_capacity filtered by provider_name and city.
CO.notes: Direct Colorado SODA endpoint and query style provided by user and activated for staging.

CT.name: Connecticut
CT.query_notes: Use SODA $query against h8mr-dn95 selecting name, address2, address3, city, statecode, zipcode, phone, minimumage, maximumage, maximumcapacity filtered by name and city.
CT.notes: Official Connecticut SODA dataset endpoint provided and wired into scraper adapter.

DC.name: District of Columbia
DC.query_notes: Use DC MyChildCare facility search with the search query parameter populated from normalized provider-name variants.
DC.notes: Direct DC child care facility search URL pattern provided by user and activated for staging.

DE.name: Delaware
DE.query_notes: Use Delaware SODA API selecting resource_name, site_street_address, site_city, site_state, site_zip_code, phone_number, age_range, capacity filtered by resource_name and site_city.
DE.notes: Direct Delaware SODA endpoint and query style provided by user and activated for staging.

FL.name: Florida
FL.query_notes: Use Florida CARES search portal where open dataset is unavailable.
FL.notes: Florida portal currently treated as not found for this project.

GA.name: Georgia
GA.query_notes: Google query for 'child care search Georgia' surfaced Georgia Child Care Search via the childcare.gov state resources page.
GA.notes: Georgia source currently treated as blocked for this project.

HI.name: Hawaii
HI.query_notes: Use Hawaii DHS Child Care Provider Search directly for provider lookups and detail pages.
HI.notes: Direct Hawaii child care provider search portal verified.

ID.query_notes: Use childcare.gov Idaho state-resources page to reach Idaho's official child care search/licensing resources.
ID.notes: Federal official fallback seeded pending direct Idaho portal/dataset confirmation.

IL.query_notes: Use Illinois DCFS Daycare Provider Lookup directly for provider searches.

PA.notes: Direct Pennsylvania SODA endpoint and fielded query pattern provided by user.

TN.query_notes: Use Tennessee One DHS child care provider map search.

TX.name: Texas
TX.query_notes: Use SoQL against bc5r-88dy selecting operation_name, phone_number, website_address, total_capacity, address_line, city, state, zipcode filtered by operation_name and city.
TX.notes: Official Texas open-data dataset verified and already wired into scraper adapter.

UT.name: Utah
UT.query_notes: Use Utah JSON open-data resource nbkf-w8sj and enumerate/filter the returned provider list for matching provider names and cities.
UT.notes: Direct Utah JSON resource provided by user and activated for staging.

VT.name: Vermont
VT.query_notes: Use Vermont SODA API selecting provider_name, address_1, address_2, provider_town, zip_code, phone_number, total_licensed_capacity filtered by provider_name and provider_town.
VT.notes: Direct Vermont SODA endpoint and query style provided by user.

VA.name: Virginia
VA.query_notes: Use Virginia DSS child day care search. Detail pages follow cc2.cgi?rm=Details;ID={facility_id}.
VA.notes: Direct Virginia child day care search and detail URL pattern verified.

WA.name: Washington
WA.query_notes: Use Washington SODA API selecting providername, licensecapacity, startingage, endingage, primarycontactphonenumber, physicalstreetaddress, physicalcity, physicalstate, physicalzip filtered by providername and physicalcity.
WA.notes: Direct Washington SODA endpoint and query style provided by user.

WV.notes: Direct West Virginia child care provider finder URL provided by user and activated for staging.
